## Briefing Package for the Minister of Natural Resources to appear before the House of Commons Standing Committee on Natural Resources (RNNR) for its Study on the Emissions Cap for the Oil and Gas Sector (April 6, 2022)
This is the package of briefing materials prepared for the Minister of Natural Resources to appear before the Standing Committee on Natural Resources on April 6, 2022.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Natural Resources Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
